parameters.query:
SELECT secid, engine, market, board, instrument_group, issuer_name, news_keywords, active
FROM ref.instrument
WHERE active = TRUE
ORDER BY secid;

WITH upsert_news AS (
    INSERT INTO raw.news_item (
        source,
        external_id,
        published_at,
        title,
        link,
        summary,
        content,
        payload,
        ingested_at
    )
    VALUES (
        $1,
        $2,
        $3::timestamptz,
        $4,
        $5,
        $6,
        $7,
        $8::jsonb,
        NOW()
    )
    ON CONFLICT (source, external_id)
    DO UPDATE SET
        published_at = EXCLUDED.published_at,
        title = EXCLUDED.title,
        link = EXCLUDED.link,
        summary = EXCLUDED.summary,
        content = EXCLUDED.content,
        payload = EXCLUDED.payload,
        ingested_at = NOW()
    RETURNING news_id
), resolved_news AS (
    SELECT news_id FROM upsert_news
    UNION ALL
    SELECT news_id
    FROM raw.news_item
    WHERE source = $1
      AND external_id = $2
    LIMIT 1
), instrument AS (
    SELECT instrument_id
    FROM ref.instrument
    WHERE secid = $9
    LIMIT 1
), upsert_match AS (
    INSERT INTO raw.news_instrument_match (
        news_id,
        instrument_id,
        matched_keywords,
        confidence,
        matched_at
    )
    SELECT
        resolved_news.news_id,
        instrument.instrument_id,
        $10,
        1.0,
        NOW()
    FROM resolved_news
    CROSS JOIN instrument
    ON CONFLICT (news_id, instrument_id)
    DO UPDATE SET
        matched_keywords = EXCLUDED.matched_keywords,
        confidence = EXCLUDED.confidence,
        matched_at = NOW()
    RETURNING news_id, instrument_id
)
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS matched_rows FROM upsert_match;

INSERT INTO ingest.lightrag_document_log (
    target_kb,
    document_type,
    source_key,
    source_table,
    source_pk,
    document_hash,
    status,
    response_payload,
    published_at
)
VALUES (
    'tradekb',
    $1,
    $2,
    $3,
    $4,
    $5,
    'published',
    $6::jsonb,
    NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (target_kb, source_key)
DO UPDATE SET
    document_type = EXCLUDED.document_type,
    source_table = EXCLUDED.source_table,
    source_pk = EXCLUDED.source_pk,
    document_hash = EXCLUDED.document_hash,
    status = 'published',
    response_payload = EXCLUDED.response_payload,
    published_at = NOW()
RETURNING source_key, status;
